description:
blink.cmp (Rust-based) is significantly faster than nvim-cmp, has built-in fuzzy matching, ghost text preview, and built-in snippet support (can potentially drop LuaSnip). Now the default in LazyVim.

Affected files:
- `home-modules/editors/neovim/lsp/completion.nix`
- `home-modules/editors/neovim/lsp/snippets.nix`
- `home-modules/editors/neovim/lsp/lspkind.nix`

Check if nvf has native blink.cmp support; if not, load via `lazy.plugins`.
title: Replace nvim-cmp with blink.cmp
